theme: varnish workshop where wet coats humidify the room
title: Varnish Workshop: Humidity-Coupled Coat Staggering
strategies: trivial: fully sequential, one coat wet at a time across the whole workshop (always feasible, congestion-free, slow)
greedy: apply every coat the instant it becomes eligible (maximal fan-out / ASAP), ignoring the shared humidity buildup

strong: reformulate as a concurrency-capped admission schedule; use the quadratic congestion law to seed an analytic steady-state concurrency K*=1/c, then sweep nearby caps and keep whichever simulates to the smallest makespan
invalid: negative application times (infeasible on any instance)
